children.heading: Budget request
children.label: b Budget request
children.text: The annual budget request for the education programs of the Bureau, as submitted as part of the President’s next annual budget request under shall include the plans required by sections 2001(c), 2002(c), and 2004(c) of this title.section 1105 of title 311So in original. Probably should be “2005(c)”.1

children.heading: Financial and compliance audits
children.label: c Financial and compliance audits
children.text: The Inspector General of the Department of the Interior shall establish a system to ensure that financial and compliance audits, based upon the extent to which a school described in subsection (a) has complied with the local financial plan under , are conducted of each Bureau-operated school at least once every 3 years.section 2010 of this title

children.heading: Administrative evaluation of schools
children.label: d Administrative evaluation of schools
children.text: The Director shall, at least once every 3 to 5 years, conduct a comprehensive evaluation of Bureau-operated schools. Such evaluation shall be in addition to any other program review or evaluation that may be required under Federal law.
